subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! The servant who is present hath appeared with a letter which thou didst send unto Our Name, the Mahdi, and hath read that wherewith thou didst call upon God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی قد حضر العبد الحاضر بکتاب ارسلته الی اسمنا المهدی و قرء ما نادیت به الله
